note.FR: Excresduo - Degats de competence +48%. Premiere alternative en attendant l'import de Dregs of Glimmer (BIS, Multishot +75%, Skill DMG +5% par cast jusqu'a 30 stacks) non encore en base.
note.EN: Excresduo - Skill Damage +48%. First alternative while Dregs of Glimmer (BIS, Multishot +75%, Skill DMG +5% per cast up to 30 stacks) is not yet in the database.

note.FR:
Focus Intensite de competence + Degats de competence + Morale Pyro. Tolerance cible 126/100. 7 modules de Track-Shift requis.

Ajustements d'affinite : Slot 1 Triangle, Slot 2 Triangle, Slot 3 Ellipse, Slot 4 Diamond, Slot 5 aucun, Slot 6 Crescent, Slot 7 Crescent, Slot 8 Crescent.

Loadout : Inferno·Midnight Sun (Pyro) en slot 1, Prime·Morale en slot 2, Devouring Wildfire en slot 3, 2x Blaze·Inspo en slots 4-5, Wings·Inspo en slot 6, 2x Blaze·Eternity en slots 7-8. Centre : Sidestep.
note.EN:
Focus Skill Intensity + Skill DMG + Pyro Morale. Target Tolerance 126/100. 7 Track-Shift modules required.

Track adjustments: Slot 1 Triangle, Slot 2 Triangle, Slot 3 Ellipse, Slot 4 Diamond, Slot 5 none, Slot 6 Crescent, Slot 7 Crescent, Slot 8 Crescent.

Loadout: Inferno·Midnight Sun (Pyro) slot 1, Prime·Morale slot 2, Devouring Wildfire slot 3, 2x Blaze·Inspo slots 4-5, Wings·Inspo slot 6, 2x Blaze·Eternity slots 7-8. Core: Sidestep.

note.FR: Lynn - DPS Pyro principal en active. Camilla l'amplifie via son passif Robe Rouge-Tintee (Morale aux allies Pyro).
note.EN: Lynn - main Pyro DPS as active unit. Camilla amplifies via her Rose-Tinted Dress passive (Morale to Pyro allies).

note.FR: Fushu - Intensite de competence, soins, boucliers et Lucidite.
note.EN: Fushu - Skill Intensity, healing, shields and Sanity recovery.

note.FR: Source principale de degats; lance les Lames de Sommelier accumulees. Donne des stacks Tipsy et l'immunite hitstun.
note.EN: Primary damage source; launches stored Sommelier Blades. Grants Tipsy stacks and hitstun immunity.

note.FR: Coeur du kit; invoque 8 Lames de Sommelier qui orbitent. Pas de drain de Lucidite tant qu'elles orbitent.
note.EN: Core of the kit; summons 8 orbiting Sommelier Blades. No Sanity drain while orbiting.

note.FR: Applique des stacks Crimson Wound, debloque la synergie passive.
note.EN: Applies Crimson Wound stacks, enables passive synergy.

notes.FR:
Camilla est une Sub-DPS Pyro centree sur son ultime Valse pourpre, qui orbite 8 Lames de Sommelier autour d'elle. Pairing optimal en sub-DPS pour Lynn (DPS Pyro principale).

Mecanique cœur : utiliser Claret Waltz en premier pour invoquer les lames (aucun drain de Lucidite tant qu'elles orbitent). Maintenir Scarlet Banquet pour enchainer les casts, ce qui met les lames en pause et accorde l'immunite hitstun. Les stacks Crimson Wound poses par les lames declenchent des degats Pyro supplementaires quand un allie Pyro les retire. A 20 stacks de Revelry, la Lucidite se restaure.

Intron priority (ordre d'unlock) :
- I1 (★★★★★) : 30% de chance que les Lames de Sommelier infligent un Crimson Wound supplementaire.
- I6 (★★★★★) : 45% PEN tant que les lames sont actives, degats supplementaires au moment du retrait.
- I2 (★★★★☆) : -15% degats subis + 55% degats infliges supplementaires tant qu'elle est orbitee.
- I4 (★★★★☆) : Crimson Wound degats +30%, Launch Speed boost.

Synergie : excellente en sub-DPS dans une equipe Pyro (avec Lynn idealement). Son passif Robe Rouge-Tintee donne Morale a elle-meme et aux allies Pyro quand deployee en compagnon. L'empilement de passifs cree un scaling de degats exponentiel avec un sequencage coordonne des skills Pyro.
notes.EN:
Camilla is a Pyro Sub-DPS built around her ultimate Claret Waltz, which orbits 8 Sommelier Blades around her. Optimal as sub-DPS for Lynn (main Pyro DPS).

Core mechanic: use Claret Waltz first to summon the blades (no Sanity drain while orbiting). Hold Scarlet Banquet to chain casts, pausing blade duration and granting hitstun immunity. Crimson Wound stacks from blade hits trigger additional Pyro damage when removed by ally Pyro skills. At 20 Revelry stacks, Sanity restores.

Intron priority (unlock order):
- I1 (★★★★★): 30% chance Sommelier's Blades inflict additional Crimson Wound.
- I6 (★★★★★): 45% PEN while blades active, extra damage on removal.
- I2 (★★★★☆): -15% damage taken + 55% damage dealt while orbited.
- I4 (★★★★☆): Crimson Wound damage +30%, Launch Speed boost.

Synergy: excels as sub-DPS in Pyro teams (particularly with Lynn). Her Rose-Tinted Dress passive grants Morale to herself and Pyro allies when deployed as companion. Passive stacking creates exponential damage scaling with coordinated Pyro skill sequencing.
